title: "last()"
description: "last: emit the last value matching `pred` (or the last value) on the source's COMPLETE. `completeWhenDepsComplete:false + terminalAsRealInput:true`. EDGE (RxJS divergence, flagged): RxJS `last()` throws EmptyError when no value matched; we COMPLETE without a value (no throw) — the clean-slate substrate has no \"complete-or-throw\" terminal and SENTINEL forbids emitting a placeholder."

<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

last: emit the last value matching `pred` (or the last value) on the source's COMPLETE.
`completeWhenDepsComplete:false + terminalAsRealInput:true`. EDGE (RxJS divergence, flagged):
RxJS `last()` throws EmptyError when no value matched; we COMPLETE without a value (no throw) —
the clean-slate substrate has no "complete-or-throw" terminal and SENTINEL forbids emitting a
placeholder.

## Import

```ts
import { last } from "@graphrefly/ts/operators";
```

## Signature

```ts
function last(pred?: (v: S) => boolean): Operator<S, S>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `pred` | `(v: S) => boolean` | pred value used by the helper. |

## Returns

A `Operator<S, S>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { last } from "@graphrefly/ts/operators";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/graph/operators.ts`
